content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with Nifty +1.22%, all major sectors green, VIX cooling -4.82% to 17.18. Auto, Realty, IT leading. Book is showing +1.30% unrealized gain — focus shifts to locking in profits via SL trails rather than chasing fresh breakouts at session highs.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24060,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1048.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+8.5% gain, well above breakeven. Current SL 1046.35 already locks in ~6.3% gain. Tightening modestly to 1048 to protect on any reversal while letting it run toward 1110 target. Q4 results strong (PAT +19%, GNPA 0.93%)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down -2.6%, near current SL of 119. Gold remains structurally bullish on safe-haven demand. SL already in place; no need to tighten further. Let it work."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1448.00,
      "new_target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+3.8% gain at 52-week high after blockbuster Q4 (PAT +27%, revenue +23%). Trailing SL up from 1445 to 1448 to lock in gain above entry while letting target play out. Stock at 52w high warrants tighter management."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Thin +0.6% gain, SL at 401 (just below entry). Power demand hitting record highs supportive. SL is appropriately placed; not tightening further as it would risk a wick stop-out. Hold for Q4 results May 15."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.6% with SL at 1745 already above entry (1734) — locking in small gain. Organon deal creates leverage overhang and execution risk; tight SL is appropriate. No change needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.6% gain, SL at 319 (just below entry). Stock near 52w high at 322.55 with board meeting April 30. Letting the consolidation play out; SL placement is fine."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 480.00,
      "new_target": 495.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2.9% gain on a +6.88% session move. Tightening SL from 478 to 480 to lock more gain after the spike. Heatwave demand catalyst intact, Q4 PAT beat. Trail to protect on inevitable mean-reversion."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.8%, SL at 615 just above entry. Stock goes ex-dividend Apr 30 (Rs 11) — mechanical drop expected tomorrow which will likely trigger SL. Acceptable: dividend captured + small price gain locks in modest win. Letting it ride to capture dividend record date."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1048.00,
      "reasoning": "Lock in ~6.5% gain on a strong winner."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1448.00,
      "reasoning": "At 52w high post-Q4 beat — trail SL above entry."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 480.00,
      "reasoning": "Tightening after +6.88% session move to protect gains."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already placed; let thesis work."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Thin gain; SL adequately placed."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already locks in gain above entry."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Near 52w high; SL adequate, board meeting tomorrow."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Holding for ex-dividend tomorrow."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BHARTIARTL, RELIANCE, MARUTI all showed strong moves but session is mature (1:50pm) and entries near intraday VWAP highs offer poor R:R. GRSE and CEATLTD showed reversal candles after morning gap-ups (CEATLTD bearish marubozu yesterday plus gave up most of today's gap; GRSE down from 3339 to 3100 — failed breakout). Avoid chasing. BAJFINANCE earnings later today is binary — no pre-event entry. BANDHANBNK pending limit at 200 vs CMP nowhere near (stale order — cancel candidate next tick if not filled).",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 50% deployed with +1.30% unrealized — solid session. Per the deployment hysteresis rule and the rolling 5-day stats (14% win rate, profit factor 0.4x), default disposition is NO new entries today. Focus is purely on managing winners: trailing SLs on PNBHOUSING, NESTLEIND, COALINDIA. Multiple pending orders (BANDHANBNK, GLENMARK, PHARMABEES, TATAPOWER) are stale and not filling — will reassess for cancellation in subsequent ticks if still unfilled. No fresh entries today; capital preservation and locking gains is the priority."
}
